# mrclean test fixture — synthetic invalid value for detection pattern testing
# Source: Anthropic API key format — sk-ant-api03- prefix + base64-like body
# Checksum-flip: body consists entirely of 'A' chars — structurally shaped but invalid
# License: test fixture only — not a real credential
